root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)as member_group_name , sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date , '!operate_date_1!'as from_date , '!operate_date_2!'as to_date , sc_mem_m_chang_request.salary_amount , sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last , to_snumber(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old)as shr_value_old , to_snumber(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new)as shr_value_new , to_snumber(decode(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last,1,0,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old))as old_share , to_snumber(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old)as change_share_amount , substr(to_snumber(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old),2,10)as reduce_share_amount , substr((sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new - sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old),0,1)as sign from sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.cancel_status = '0' and sc_mem_m_chang_request.reason_code = 'MEM' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
